examples: The impact of Darwinism on modern biology is greater than Mendelism.
This is techno-social Darwinism, nature red in pixel and claw.
She said my understanding of Darwinism needed some fine-tuning.
If being slow and stupid makes for a successful congressman (or woman), then that is Darwinism at work.
At first, of course, the rediscovery of the Mendelian gene was thought to be the death knell for Darwinism.
